package.title: Premium Chandigarh with Timber Trail Escape

highlights.text: Serial code CH-014 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-CH-014-PREM
State / Country: Chandigarh & HP / India | Category: Leisure & Escapes
Ideal for: Couples, Families & Weekend Seekers
Best season: Round the year (October to March ideal)
Round-trip cable car tickets at Timber Trail Parwanoo
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private sunset boat cruise with prioritized boarding at Sukhna Lake
Shopping: Elante Mall, Phulkari embroidery, Sector 26 artisanal cafes

itinerary.title: Premium Chandigarh with Timber Trail Escape
itinerary.tagline: The Urban Architectural Marvel Meets Breathtaking Shivalik Hills
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to a flawlessly designed urban getaway curated by the destination specialists at TRAGUIN. This exclusive 3 Nights / 4 Days luxury package beautifully unifies the symmetrical, green grandeur of India's most organized city—Chandigarh—with the majestic, cliff-hanging serenity of Timber Trail, Parwanoo.

Travel Format: Private Tailor-made Luxury Getaway (FIT). Vehicle: Chauffeur-driven Premium Segment Sedan / SUV (Innova Crysta). Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Daily Luxury Buffet Breakfast & Dinner Included). TRAGUIN Curated Touch: Pre-booked private cable car transfers at Timber Trail, VIP seating arrangements during lake excursions, and handpicked premium hotels.
itinerary.seo_title: CH-014 | Premium Chandigarh with Timber Trail Escape | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days package (CH-014 / TG-CH-014-PREM): Sukhna Lake boat ride, Rock Garden, Rose Garden, Pinjore Gardens, Timber Trail cable car, and split-stay hotel options.

highlights.text: Sukhna Lake Private Boat Ride & Sunset Photography
Rock Garden, Rose Garden & Pinjore Mughal Gardens

days.title: Arrival in Chandigarh & Sunset Lake Cruise
days.description: Arrive at Chandigarh Airport or Railway Station, where you will be greeted with a warm welcome by your dedicated TRAGUIN luxury representative. Step into your premium private vehicle and transfer to your handpicked luxury hotel in the heart of the city. We visit the iconic Sukhna Lake and enjoy a private boat ride on its calm waters as the golden sun dips below the horizon.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sukhna Lake & Promenade walk
Evening Experience: Private Boat Ride & sunset photography

days.title: Legendary Rock Garden, Rose Garden & Pinjore Gardens
days.description: Indulge in a fine breakfast before plunging into the artistic brilliance of Chandigarh Sightseeing at the world-famous Rock Garden and Zakir Hussain Rose Garden. In the afternoon, take a comfortable short drive to the historical Pinjore Gardens (Yadavindra Gardens), built in the Mughal style with cascading terraces and grand fountains.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Rock Garden, Rose Garden, Pinjore Mughal Gardens
Optional Activities: Shopping at Sector 17 Premium High-Street Market

days.title: Ascent to Timber Trail Parwanoo via Cable Car
days.description: Following a sumptuous breakfast, check out from your hotel as we embark on a Luxury Chandigarh Holiday extension towards Parwanoo, Himachal Pradesh. Arrive at the base station of Timber Trail, where a private cable car awaits you. Reach the exclusive mountain resort perched on top of the hill and check into your premium room offering magnificent views of the valley.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Shivalik Mountain Panoramas, Timber Trail Cable Car Transfer
Evening Experience: Tea/Coffee over a spectacular valley sunset view
Overnight Stay: Parwanoo (Timber Trail Heights Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast & Grand Valley-View Dinner

days.title: Memories at the Peak & Farewell to the Hills
days.description: Wake up to a crisp morning over the mountains and enjoy a delicious breakfast suspended in nature. Later, glide back down the valley via the cable car where your luxury vehicle is stationed. Enjoy a smooth drive back to Chandigarh as your chauffeur transfers you back to Chandigarh Airport or Railway Station.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Morning resort mountain trails
Assistance: Departure luggage assistance by chauffeur

hotels.name: Lemon Tree Hotel / Classic City Stay | Timber Trail Resort (Base Wing)
Hyatt Regency Chandigarh / Radisson | Moksha Himalaya Spa Resort / Timber Trail Heights
The Lalit Chandigarh / JW Marriott | Moksha Luxury Suite Wing
The Oberoi Sukhvilas Spa Resort | Moksha Royal Presidential Villa
hotels.description: Option 04 — Ultra Luxury tier handpicked property.

inclusions.text: 03 Nights luxury stay across handpicked deluxe/premium hotels
Daily premium multi-cuisine buffet breakfast and curated dinners
Air-conditioned private Innova Crysta throughout the complete itinerary
Round-trip cable car tickets at Timber Trail Parwanoo
Pre-arranged entry fees to Rock Garden, Rose Garden, and Pinjore Gardens
Complimentary premium boat ride voucher at Sukhna Lake
Dedicated 24/7 TRAGUIN helpline & operational guest support
All applicable fuel charges, parking fees, tolls, and driver allowances
Airfare / Inter-state train tickets to Chandigarh
Personal expenses such as room service, laundry, phone calls, or tips
Any lunches or snacks unless specifically outlined
Professional camera or video shooting licenses at monuments
Comprehensive personal or medical travel insurance
